title: Summarize a benchmark run distribution
description: Aggregate repeated benchmark samples into median, spread, and outlier counts with the environment recorded for comparison.
body: Use when turning raw benchmark samples into a comparable result. Actions: collect the repeated samples, compute median and percentiles plus a spread measure, count and flag outliers, and attach the environment manifest and sample size to the summary. Do not report a single best-of run as the result. This skill exposes capability only and must not run benchmark workloads without runtime permission. Validation signals include a distribution summary with sample count and variance recorded. Risk boundary: if variance is high or samples are few, report the result as inconclusive rather than claiming a regression or win.
